## Checklist

- [ ] The change is linked to an approved specification, ADR, or maintenance need.
- [ ] The implementation stays within the documented scope.
- [ ] Architecture and module boundaries remain aligned with the SCEP documentation.
- [ ] No unrelated application features were added.
